scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,guest,desk -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/pbx-server" "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/guest-tablet" "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/front-desk"
scripts.dev:desk: concurrently -n server,desk -c blue,yellow "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/pbx-server" "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/front-desk"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n livekit,server,guest,desk -c magenta,blue,green,yellow "npm run livekit" "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/pbx-server" "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/guest-tablet" "npm run dev -w @hotel-voip/front-desk"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hotel-voip/guest-tablet && npm run build -w @hotel-voip/front-desk && npm run build -w @hotel-voip/pbx-server
scripts.build:apks: npm run build:desk-apk && npm run build:guest-apk && node scripts/stage-apks.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @hotel-voip/guest-tablet && npm run lint -w @hotel-voip/front-desk && npm run lint -w @hotel-voip/pbx-server
